description_long: This is a compact, submachine gun-style rifle with a boxy, rectangular receiver and a prominent magazine well extending downward. The body is primarily matte black metal, featuring a simple wire folding stock at the rear and a short barrel at the front. The top of the receiver has basic iron sights, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame. The magazine is a detachable box type, protruding vertically from the bottom. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal external embellishments, and the weapon appears robust and functional for close-quarters urban use.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a wire folding stock, short barrel, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the receiver.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the receiver, wire folding stock, trigger, and magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the rear sight, wire stock, and the back of the receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, wire stock, and magazine.
